name: Chart Industries Inc. Depositary Shares each Representing a 1/20th Interest in a Share of 6.75% Series B Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock
summary: Chart Industries Inc. Depositary Shares each Representing a 1/20th Interest in a Share of 6.75% Series B Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock represents a fractional ownership in a series of preferred stock issued by Chart Industries. These preferred shares mandatorily convert into common stock on a specified date and pay a fixed dividend. As a depositary share, it simplifies trading and ownership of the underlying preferred stock.
